requirement_topic.en: Networked Charger Interoperability, OCPP and EMC

summary.en: Honduras does not appear to have a single official national OCPP rule for EV chargers as of 2026-06-14. For public or fleet chargers, OCPP interoperability, remote monitoring, metering, billing integration, cyber configuration, and load management are likely to be specified by the charge-point operator, importer, fleet owner, municipality, or site owner. EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared against IEC 61000-family requirements and project utility limits because chargers add switching converters, harmonics, leakage current, and communication equipment to the distribution network.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，洪都拉斯似乎尚无单一官方全国性充电桩OCPP规则。对于公共或车队充电桩，OCPP互操作、远程监控、计量、计费集成、网络安全配置和负载管理较可能由充电点运营商、进口商、车队业主、市政方或场地方规定。由于充电桩会向配电网增加开关变换器、谐波、泄漏电流和通信设备，应按IEC 61000系列要求及项目公用事业限值准备EMC和电能质量证据。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，宏都拉斯似乎尚無單一官方全國性充電樁OCPP規則。對於公共或車隊充電樁，OCPP互操作、遠程監控、計量、計費集成、網絡安全配置和負載管理較可能由充電點運營商、進口商、車隊業主、市政方或場地方規定。由於充電樁會向配電網增加開關變換器、諧波、洩漏電流和通訊設備，應按IEC 61000系列要求及項目公用事業限值準備EMC和電能品質證據。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — charge point to central system interoperability where specified
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-21-2 — EMC requirements for off-board EV charging systems
CREE / ENEE or project-specific power-quality and metering requirements

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly implement GB/T 27930-2023 vehicle-to-charger communication over CAN. China back-office protocols may be proprietary or OCPP depending on the operator, but a China cloud integration and GB/T 27930 DC stack do not prove compatibility with a Honduras charge-point operator's OCPP backend, Spanish user interface, local SIM/router configuration, metering format, or EMC requirements.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常通过CAN实现GB/T 27930-2023车桩通信。中国后台协议可能因运营商而采用私有协议或OCPP，但中国云平台集成和GB/T 27930直流通信栈不能证明其兼容洪都拉斯充电点运营商的OCPP后台、西班牙语用户界面、本地SIM/路由器配置、计量格式或EMC要求。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常通過CAN實現GB/T 27930-2023車樁通訊。中國後台協議可能因運營商而採用私有協議或OCPP，但中國雲平台集成和GB/T 27930直流通訊棧不能證明其兼容宏都拉斯充電點運營商的OCPP後台、西班牙語用戶界面、本地SIM/路由器配置、計量格式或EMC要求。

standards_or_laws: China EMC and radio requirements where applicable

gap.en: Exporters should confirm the OCPP version, certificates, meter payloads, roaming or payment requirements, SIM/router bands, language settings, remote diagnostics, firmware update policy, and cybersecurity settings with the Honduras operator. EMC evidence should cover conducted and radiated emissions, immunity, harmonics, flicker, leakage current, and 60 Hz operating points. GB/T 27930 is vehicle-side DC communication, not an OCPP backend substitute.
gap.zh: 出口商应与洪都拉斯运营方确认OCPP版本、证书、计量报文、漫游或支付要求、SIM/路由器频段、语言设置、远程诊断、固件更新政策和网络安全设置。EMC证据应覆盖传导和辐射发射、抗扰度、谐波、闪变、泄漏电流及60 Hz工况。GB/T 27930是车辆侧直流通信，并非OCPP后台替代品。
gap.zht: 出口商應與宏都拉斯運營方確認OCPP版本、證書、計量報文、漫遊或支付要求、SIM/路由器頻段、語言設置、遠程診斷、固件更新政策和網絡安全設置。EMC證據應覆蓋傳導和輻射發射、抗擾度、諧波、閃變、洩漏電流及60 Hz工況。GB/T 27930是車輛側直流通訊，並非OCPP後台替代品。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — OCPP is mandatory when required by the CPO, fleet, tender, municipality, site owner, or payment platform; EMC and power-quality evidence are expected for utility and product acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not an OCPP backend or IEC 61000 EMC substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Honduras, treat OCPP as a project interoperability gate and IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-2 as the conservative EMC evidence baseline. GB/T 27930 and China cloud integration do not prove local backend or EMC readiness.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对洪都拉斯，应将OCPP视为项目互操作关口，并将IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-2作为保守的EMC证据基线。GB/T 27930和中国云平台集成不能证明当地后台或EMC已就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對宏都拉斯，應將OCPP視為項目互操作關口，並將IEC 61000 / IEC 61851-21-2作為保守的EMC證據基線。GB/T 27930和中國雲平台集成不能證明當地後台或EMC已就緒。
